title: ilex brevipedicellata
intro: Ilex brevipedicellata, also known as the Chinese holly or Chinese evergreen holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ilex brevipedicellata include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and improving respiratory health, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Ilex brevipedicellata include teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
